name: Spam Score
author: Bulwark Mail Community
description: Adds a Spam Analysis section to a message's "More details" panel. Reads the raw spam-filter headers (SpamAssassin / Rspamd score, threshold and level, plus any AI verdict) directly off the message and shows a colour-coded breakdown.

placeUnderSecurity.label: Show under “Authentication & Security”
placeUnderSecurity.description: Render the spam breakdown beneath the existing Authentication & Security category instead of as its own section. Falls back to its own section when a message has no auth results.

showWhenClean.label: Show for clean mail too
showWhenClean.description: Display the section even when the message scored below the spam threshold. Disable to only surface it for spam / suspicious mail.
